column1: Hey Zuehl, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool I got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
Can I see the Cabo and Cancun options
yea for sure, both have been super popular this year gonna be lit
how many ppl in your group so far?
word thats solid! we all from the same school?
firee we had a few groups from A&M last year, y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
bet! is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
bet whats the best email for you?
just sent! lmk if you got it
Okay I got it which place is normally better party wise. This group loves to party so
Cancun for sure, also a lot cheaper
the grand o in cancun is like the go to spring break spot for parties lol
Is the party pass 200 for all those events
thats for a 3 event pass so you choose 3 of the options
yoo Zuehl whats good, how we feelin about those options so far?
What's up so yea the Cancun grand oasis is what we want
aight bet. we ready to get it locked in?
Yea we are meeting in a few hours to get it set. But was curious we may have another group of 4 coming as well. Is the room situation 4 per room max correct
yea 4 per room max, its how most all inclusive resorts are. typically 3-4 max occupancy
we can do two rooms of 4 though
Would they put those rooms close together or
depends whats available at the time you check in. during the check in process is when you can request rooms be in the same building, same floor, next to eachother, etc.
Liked “depends whats available at the time you check in. during the check in process is when you can request rooms be in the same building, same floor, next to eachother, etc.”
the resort determines that on their end based on clean rooms available, their check outs for the day, etc
Alright so we ready to go
I'll make the reservation right now and send over
actually did y'all just start a reservation? is Avery in your group
What time do we need to get there and what time would we need to leave?
rooms are ready at 3 but you can still get there before then and use the resort. eat/drink/pool
yooo Zuehl. is Pheonix rollin on the trip?
we need them to get their payment in asap if so
Lemme get a hold of him
And also what is this black band thing I'm hearing about at the resort
That may be the wristband for the upgraded restaurants. You're able to upgrade per day at the check in desk. I think it's $60 per day
In my honest opinion, not worth it
So it doesn't give access to like different bars or?
All the bars are accessible and open bar for the most part with the reg wrist band
You may be able to get like top shelf liquor potentially
Def up to you be I'd save the money
Or try it out for a day if you want, while you're there
Yea I probably will I heard food is not that great but🤣
It's honestly mid ngl but the resort is hella lit
Kinda the price you pay lol
Yea I mean not that big a deal. Yea that's what I figured! I laughed because my flight was more expensive
And is it the pyramid one we're staying at or
This is just all students or mixed at ours?
Kinda mixed but like 80% students for sure
Thoughts on going to coco bongo?
its a once in a lifetime experience. definitely different
yoyo, if you and Logan could toss in your flight info hwen you get a sec, so we can set up your airport transfers
Hey man what you think about what's going on in Mexico. Think Cancun will be fine?
Whats up, right now there's no travel ban and Cancun is under a Level 2 advisory, which has been in place since August. The airport and resorts are operating normally
From an operational standpoint, everything is running as scheduled. If there were any federal restriction or real shutdown, we would notify the groups booked for Mexico
Yea hopefully it will stay like that.
yea should be gucci but if anything did change we'll assess it all. highly doubt it tho
yoo! are you on the same flight as the others in your group?
bet, will get that added in
I just emailed over the details on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Oh I didn't fill that form out for transportation
And what's the party pass offer?
party pass is dope comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, HOF, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, and more
3-Night Party Package:$210 per person 4-Night Party Package:$269 per person 5-Night Party Package:$299 per person and Booze cruise event is $79
Ey question do I still need to put my flight info in or am I good for transportation from airport
Can we pay for the booze cruise now
yea for sure. everyone in the group wants it added in?
Ey question so a person from the other group of 4 dropped from coming obviously he's not trying to get money back but could someone just take that spot or?
Damn unfort it's too late to do any switching
Damn unfort it's too late to do any switching
Yea no I figured all good!
Btw our flight delayed in Cancun. Says we aren't landing till 5.18 this evening
Ah damn. all good, our operations team is tracking your flight #
